name: PancakeSwap Infinity
special_mechanism_summary: PancakeSwap Infinity is a hook-based singleton AMM (modeled on Uniswap V4) deployed on BSC, supporting V2-style, V3-style, and custom hook-defined curves within the same contract. Hook contracts can modify swap behavior, fee logic, or liquidity operations. Flash accounting within lock scopes enables within-lock token borrowing.
notes: C3' combination potential: freshly deployed (2024) with limited production battle-testing — composability assumptions not yet stress-tested; hook contracts execute external code during swap, so any integrating BSC protocol may be exposed to hook-defined behavior that changes without notice; flash accounting creates within-lock borrowing surface on BSC at lower gas costs than Ethereum, making attack strategies cheaper to execute.
